title: cymbidium autumnale
intro: Cymbidium autumnale, also known as the Autumn Lady's Tresses, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Australia, Asia, and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cymbidium autumnale include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and soothing digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Cymbidium autumnale can be made by infusing the plant's roots in hot water to create a tea or by drying the roots to make a powder for use in medicinal remedies.
